tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Naruto Uzumaki is a ninja from the Hidden Leaf Village known for his never-give-up attitude and strong determination.

He was once an outcast because he carried the powerful Nine-Tailed Fox inside him.

Despite his lonely childhood, Naruto dreams of becoming the Hokage to earn everyone’s respect.

Through hard work and perseverance, he becomes one of the strongest shinobi in history.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Shadow Clone Jutsu
  • Rasengan
  • Rasenshuriken
  • Sage Mode
  • Kurama Chakra Mode
  • Six Paths Sage Mode
  • Massive Chakra Reserves
  • Enhanced Healing Ability
  • Superhuman Speed & Reflexes
  • Advanced Taijutsu
  • Wind Release Chakra
  • Truth-Seeking Orbs
  • Chakra Arms
  • Tailed Beast Bomb
  • Sensory Abilities

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Favorite food is ramen
  • Host of the Nine-Tailed Fox (Kurama)
  • Became the 7th Hokage
  • Was once the weakest student in the academy
  • Never gives up on his friends

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Sasuke Uchiha is a powerful ninja from the Uchiha clan known for his intelligence and calm personality.

He was driven by revenge after witnessing the destruction of his clan by his brother Itachi.

Sasuke seeks power at any cost to achieve his goals and surpass his limits.

Over time, he evolves from a revenge-driven individual into a protector of the ninja world.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Sharingan
  • Rinnegan
  • Chidori
  • Amaterasu
  • Susanoo
  • Fire Style Jutsu
  • Lightning Release
  • Genjutsu Mastery
  • High Speed Combat
  • Swordsmanship
  • Space-Time Ninjutsu
  • Chidori Variants
  • Advanced Tactical Intelligence
  • Curse Mark Power
  • Perfect Susanoo

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Last surviving member of the Uchiha clan
  • Younger brother of Itachi Uchiha
  • Trained under Orochimaru
  • Rival and best friend of Naruto
  • Married Sakura and has a daughter Sarada

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Sakura Haruno is a kunoichi from the Hidden Leaf Village known for her intelligence and medical skills.

She starts as a normal ninja but becomes one of the strongest kunoichi through hard work.

Under Tsunade’s training, she gains incredible strength and healing abilities.

Sakura plays a crucial role in supporting her team during battles.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Medical Ninjutsu
  • Superhuman Strength
  • Chakra Control
  • Healing Techniques
  • Summoning Jutsu (Katsuyu)
  • Advanced Taijutsu
  • Byakugou Seal
  • Poison Resistance
  • Battle Intelligence
  • Support Skills
  • Regeneration Ability
  • Precise Chakra Attacks
  • High Endurance
  • Team Coordination
  • Defensive Techniques

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Student of Tsunade
  • One of the strongest medical ninjas
  • Teammate of Naruto and Sasuke
  • Married Sasuke
  • Mother of Sarada

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Kakashi Hatake is a highly skilled ninja known as the Copy Ninja for his ability to replicate techniques using his Sharingan.

He is the leader of Team 7 and mentor to Naruto, Sasuke, and Sakura.

Kakashi is calm, intelligent, and always values teamwork above all.

He later becomes the Sixth Hokage of the Hidden Leaf Village.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Sharingan
  • Lightning Blade (Chidori)
  • Copy Ninja Techniques
  • Kamui (Space-Time Jutsu)
  • High Intelligence
  • Advanced Taijutsu
  • Stealth & Assassination
  • Fire, Water & Lightning Release
  • Genjutsu Skills
  • Summoning Jutsu (Dogs)
  • Fast Reflexes
  • Strategic Combat
  • Hand Seal Mastery
  • Shadow Clone Jutsu
  • Leadership Skills

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Known as the Copy Ninja
  • Student of Minato Namikaze
  • Always wears a mask
  • Reads Icha Icha novels
  • Became the Sixth Hokage

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Itachi Uchiha is a prodigy of the Uchiha clan known for his intelligence and powerful genjutsu.

He sacrificed everything, including his clan, to protect the Hidden Leaf Village.

Though seen as a villain, his actions were driven by peace and love for his brother Sasuke.

Itachi remains one of the most respected and tragic characters in the series.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Sharingan
  • Mangekyou Sharingan
  • Tsukuyomi
  • Amaterasu
  • Susanoo
  • Genjutsu Mastery
  • Fire Style Jutsu
  • High Intelligence
  • Shuriken Mastery
  • Fast Hand Seals
  • Crow Clone Jutsu
  • Illusion Techniques
  • Strategic Thinking
  • Stealth Skills
  • Exceptional Reflexes

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Killed his clan to prevent war
  • Joined Akatsuki as a spy
  • Brother of Sasuke
  • Highly intelligent prodigy
  • Secretly protected the Leaf Village

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Minato is the Fourth Hokage.

Known as Yellow Flash.

He is Naruto’s father.

He sealed Kurama inside Naruto.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• 4th Hokage
  • Naruto’s father
  • Fastest ninja
  • Hero of Leaf

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Hinata is a gentle ninja from Hyuga clan.

She loves Naruto deeply.

She becomes strong over time.

She fights with courage.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Hyuga princess
  • Naruto’s wife
  • Mother of Boruto
  • Kind nature

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Gaara was once feared as a monster.

He becomes a great leader.

He controls sand.

He becomes Kazekage.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Kazekage
  • Former Jinchuriki
  • Friend of Naruto
  • Controls sand

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Rock Lee is a taijutsu specialist.

He cannot use ninjutsu.

He trains extremely hard.

He proves hard work beats talent.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Student of Guy
  • No ninjutsu
  • Hard worker
  • Green suit

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Shikamaru is a genius strategist.

He prefers a lazy life.

He has high IQ.

He becomes Naruto’s advisor.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Lazy genius
  • 200+ IQ
  • Advisor of Hokage
  • Chess lover

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Iruka is a kind-hearted ninja and academy teacher.

He was the first person to truly acknowledge Naruto.

He acts as a father figure to Naruto.

He believes in guiding the next generation.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Academy teacher
  • Naruto’s mentor
  • Lost parents to Nine-Tails
  • Kind personality

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Konohamaru is the grandson of the Third Hokage.

He looks up to Naruto as his mentor.

He is energetic and determined.

He wants to become Hokage.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Grandson of 3rd Hokage
  • Admires Naruto
  • Future Hokage dream
  • Leader of his team

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Kiba is a wild and energetic ninja who fights alongside his dog Akamaru.

He relies on strong senses and teamwork.

He is confident and competitive.

He values loyalty deeply.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Partner is Akamaru
  • Dog-based fighting style
  • Strong sense of smell
  • Loud personality

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Shino is a calm and mysterious ninja.

He uses insects in battle.

He rarely shows emotions.

He is highly intelligent and tactical.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Uses bugs
  • Very calm
  • Hidden emotions
  • Rarely loses fights

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Choji is a kind-hearted ninja who values friendship.

He uses his body size in combat.

He gains strength from confidence.

He is loyal to his friends.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Loves food
  • Best friend of Shikamaru
  • Kind personality
  • Uses size power

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Ino is a confident and skilled kunoichi.

She specializes in mind techniques.

She is competitive with Sakura.

She values teamwork and friendship.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Flower shop owner
  • Rival of Sakura
  • Mind techniques
  • Team 10 member

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Neji is a prodigy of the Hyuga clan.

He believes in destiny.

He uses Byakugan in combat.

He later changes his mindset.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Hyuga prodigy
  • Cousin of Hinata
  • Believed in fate
  • Strong genius

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Tenten is a weapons specialist ninja.

She uses scroll-based attacks.

She is disciplined and focused.

She aims to become a great kunoichi.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Weapon expert
  • Team Guy member
  • Accurate attacks
  • Hardworking ninja

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Might Guy is a powerful taijutsu master.

He believes in hard work.

He trains Rock Lee.

He has a strong energetic personality.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Teacher of Lee
  • Green jumpsuit
  • Energetic
  • Rival of Kakashi

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Zabuza is a dangerous rogue ninja from the Mist Village.

He is known as the Demon of the Mist.

He uses a giant sword.

He shows hidden humanity through Haku.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Demon of Mist
  • Uses big sword
  • Partner of Haku
  • Rogue ninja

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Haku is a gentle yet powerful ninja who serves Zabuza.

He possesses a rare Ice Release ability.

Despite being a fighter, he has a kind heart.

He values loyalty above all.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Loyal to Zabuza
  • Tragic childhood
  • Uses ice powers
  • Kind personality

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Orochimaru is a legendary Sannin obsessed with immortality.

He experiments on humans for power.

He is one of the main villains in Naruto.

He seeks ultimate knowledge of jutsu.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• One of the Sannin
  • Former Leaf ninja
  • Created Sound Village
  • Seeks immortality

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Jiraiya is one of the Legendary Sannin.

He is Naruto’s mentor.

He is powerful yet humorous.

He trains Naruto to become strong.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• One of Sannin
  • Teacher of Naruto
  • Writes novels
  • Trained Minato

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Tsunade is a Legendary Sannin and medical expert.

She becomes the Fifth Hokage.

She has immense strength.

She trains Sakura.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• 5th Hokage
  • Sannin member
  • Medical expert
  • Gambling habit

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Anko is a bold and fearless ninja.

She was once Orochimaru’s student.

She works as a Chunin exam proctor.

She has a wild personality.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Student of Orochimaru
  • Chunin exam proctor
  • Bold personality
  • Uses snake jutsu

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Kurenai is a skilled genjutsu specialist.

She leads Team 8.

She is calm and intelligent.

She focuses on illusion techniques.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Team 8 leader
  • Genjutsu expert
  • Calm personality
  • Leaf Jonin

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Asuma is a skilled Jonin and leader of Team 10.

He is calm and experienced.

He values his students deeply.

He is the son of the Third Hokage.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Son of 3rd Hokage
  • Team 10 leader
  • Uses chakra blades
  • Calm personality

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Ebisu is a strict teacher assigned to Konohamaru.

He focuses on proper ninja training.

He initially dislikes Naruto.

He values discipline.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Konohamaru’s teacher
  • Wears sunglasses
  • Strict personality
  • Leaf ninja

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Hayate is a calm and sickly ninja who serves as a Chunin exam proctor.

He is skilled despite his weak appearance.

He is dedicated to his duty.

He shows bravery in danger.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Chunin exam proctor
  • Always coughing
  • Brave ninja
  • Uses sword

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Dosu is a ninja from the Sound Village.

He uses sound-based attacks.

He is calm and strategic.

He participates in Chunin exams.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Sound ninja
  • Uses arm device
  • Chunin exam fighter
  • Calm personality
